description: Learn how to participate in Binance NFT sales using the Subscription Mechanism, which provides a fair opportunity for users to purchase NFTs.
topic_summary: The Binance NFT Subscription Mechanism consists of four phases: Preparation, Subscription, Calculation, and Distribution. Users must meet specific prerequisites, including holding BNB or locking NFTs, to qualify for participation tickets. The process ensures a fair selection of winners and distribution of NFTs [t=3:68-215:49].
